title: The FAIR Metroline - Steps for your FAIRification Workflow
author: Jetten, Mijke
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Which steps are involved in making data FAIR? What do these steps mean and, importantly, how do you practically do these steps? The Health-RI FAIR Metroline below provides guidance to help you reach your FAIR goals. It gives an overview of steps used by a variety of publications and initiatives to reach their FAIR goals.
